allow: Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('./src/utils/notificationService.js'\).then\(m => { console.log\('OK notificationService loads, exports:', Object.keys\(m\)\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('LOAD ERROR:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('./src/app.js'\).then\(m => { console.log\('OK app loads'\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('LOAD ERROR:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('./src/app.js'\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('OK'\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('LOAD ERROR:', e.message\); console.error\(e.stack\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")
